---
title: "People"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: about.css
resources:
  - people.yml
  - assets/people/*
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="about-hero" style="padding-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <p class="about-eyebrow">PEOPLE</p>
  <h1 class="about-title">The people behind<br/>the curriculum.</h1>
  <p class="about-tagline">Our mission is to establish AI engineering as a discipline — open, rigorous, and global. These are the people who make that real, from writing the technical material to shipping hardware kits to classrooms that never had them.</p>
</div>

<!-- All people are loaded from people.yml — edit that file to add/remove/update anyone. -->
<div id="people-container"></div>


<style>
.initials-avatar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 50%; color: #fff; font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase; user-select: none;
}
.team-card .initials-avatar { width: 120px; height: 120px; font-size: 2.2rem; margin: 0 auto; }
.team-card-featured .initials-avatar { width: 140px; height: 140px; font-size: 2.6rem; margin: 0 auto; }
.compact-avatar .initials-avatar { width: 64px; height: 64px; font-size: 1.1rem; }

/* Featured cards — larger, more prominent */
.team-grid-featured {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  max-width: 700px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
.team-card-featured {
  background: var(--ab-card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--ab-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}
.team-card-featured:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.team-card-featured img {
  width: 140px;
  height: 140px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  border: 3px solid var(--ab-border);
}
.team-card-featured h3 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--ab-text);
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.team-card-featured .team-role {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--ab-accent);
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.team-card-featured .team-affiliation {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--ab-text-muted);
}
.team-card-featured .team-bio {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.85rem !important;
  line-height: 1.5 !important;
  color: var(--ab-text-muted);
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}

/* Hero card — Vijay, solo, centered, larger */
.team-grid-hero {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.team-card-hero {
  background: var(--ab-card-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--ab-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2.25rem 2rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 520px;
  width: 100%;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}
.team-card-hero:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}
.team-card-hero img {
  width: 160px;
  height: 160px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  border: 3px solid var(--ab-accent);
}
.team-card-hero h3 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--ab-text);
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.team-card-hero .team-role {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: var(--ab-accent);
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.team-card-hero .team-affiliation {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--ab-text-muted);
}
.team-card-hero .team-bio {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem !important;
  line-height: 1.55 !important;
  color: var(--ab-text-muted);
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}

/* Global Team grid — many featured cards, responsive */
.team-grid-team {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

/* Solo featured card — same size as other featured cards, centered */
.team-grid-solo {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.team-grid-solo .team-card-featured {
  max-width: 340px;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Acknowledgments — edX lineage + Our Story + mission paper (prose, not cards) */
.acknowledgments-block {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: 1.5rem 1.75rem;
  background: var(--ab-card-bg);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--ab-accent);
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
}
.acknowledgments-block h2 {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--ab-text);
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}
.acknowledgments-block p {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--ab-text-muted);
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
}
.acknowledgments-block p:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.acknowledgments-block .acknowledgments-credits {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding-top: 0.9rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ab-border);
}
.acknowledgments-block .acknowledgments-cta {
  margin-top: 0.75rem;
}
.acknowledgments-block .acknowledgments-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--ab-accent);
  padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--ab-accent);
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;
}
.acknowledgments-block .acknowledgments-btn:hover {
  background: var(--ab-accent);
  color: #fff;
  border-bottom-color: var(--ab-accent);
}

/* Contribution tags — semantic colored chips */
.contrib-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 0.9rem;
}
.contrib-tag {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.contrib-tag.curriculum { background: #cfe2f3; border-color: #4a90c4; color: #2c5a7a; }
.contrib-tag.outreach   { background: #d4edda; border-color: #3d9e5a; color: #1e5a35; }
.contrib-tag.platform   { background: #fdebd0; border-color: #c87b2a; color: #6e4010; }
.contrib-tag.hardware   { background: #f9d6d5; border-color: #c44;    color: #8a2020; }
.contrib-tag.edx        { background: #e8eaed; border-color: #9aa0a6; color: #3c4043; }

/* edX row — force 3 columns, smaller cards */
.team-grid-three {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card {
  padding: 1.25rem 1rem;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card img {
  width: 64px;
  height: 64px;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card h3 {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card .team-role {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card .team-affiliation {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
}
.team-grid-three .team-card .team-bio {
  font-size: 0.75rem !important;
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .team-grid-featured { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .team-grid-three { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/js-yaml@4/dist/js-yaml.min.js"></script>
<script>
(async () => {
  const container = document.getElementById('people-container');

  const palette = ['#6b7b8d','#7b6b8d','#8d7b6b','#6b8d7b','#8d6b7b','#7b8d6b','#5f7a8a','#8a5f7a','#7a8a5f','#5f8a7a'];
  function initialsColor(name) { let h=0; for(let i=0;i<name.length;i++) h=name.charCodeAt(i)+((h<<5)-h); return palette[Math.abs(h)%palette.length]; }
  function getInitials(name) { return name.split(' ').filter(Boolean).map(w=>w[0]).slice(0,2).join(''); }

  function addFallback(img, name) {
    img.onerror = () => {
      const d = document.createElement('div');
      d.className = 'initials-avatar';
      d.style.background = initialsColor(name);
      d.textContent = getInitials(name);
      img.replaceWith(d);
    };
  }

  async function checkAvatars(el) {
    for (const img of el.querySelectorAll('img[data-name]')) {
      try {
        const r = await fetch(img.src, { method: 'HEAD', mode: 'cors' });
        if (!r.ok || r.url.includes('/identicons/')) {
          const d = document.createElement('div');
          d.className = 'initials-avatar';
          d.style.background = initialsColor(img.dataset.name);
          d.textContent = getInitials(img.dataset.name);
          img.replaceWith(d);
        }
      } catch(e) {}
    }
  }

  try {
    const resp = await fetch('people.yml');
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error();
    const data = jsyaml.load(await resp.text());

    const groupsHtml = data.groups.map((group, i) => {
      const isCompact = group.compact === true;
      const isFeatured = group.featured === true;
      const isHero = group.hero === true;
      const hasHeader = group.name && group.name.trim().length > 0;

      let cards;
      const imgUrl = (m) => m.image ? m.image : `https://github.com/${m.github}.png`;
      if (isCompact) {
        cards = group.members.map(m => {
          const img = imgUrl(m);
          const aff = m.affiliation || '';
          const tip = aff ? `${m.name} — ${aff}` : m.name;
          return `
            <a href="https://github.com/${m.github}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
               class="compact-avatar" title="${tip}">
              <img src="${img}" alt="${m.name}" loading="lazy" data-name="${m.name}" />
              <span class="compact-name">${m.name.split(' ')[0]}</span>
            </a>`;
        }).join('');
      } else {
        const cardClass = isHero ? 'team-card-hero'
                        : isFeatured ? 'team-card-featured'
                        : 'team-card';
        cards = group.members.map(m => {
          const img = imgUrl(m);
          const role = m.role ? `<div class="team-role">${m.role}</div>` : '';
          const aff = m.affiliation ? `<div class="team-affiliation">${m.affiliation}</div>` : '';
          const bio = m.bio ? `<p class="team-bio">${m.bio}</p>` : '';
          return `
            <div class="${cardClass}">
              <img src="${img}" alt="${m.name}" loading="lazy" data-name="${m.name}" />
              <h3>${m.name}</h3>
              ${role}${aff}${bio}
            </div>`;
        }).join('');
      }

      const isLastGroup = i === data.groups.length - 1;
      const hasTrailing = isLastGroup && (data.institutions?.length || data.origins);
      const divider = (!isLastGroup || hasTrailing) ? '<hr class="about-divider" />' : '';

      let gridClass;
      if (isHero) gridClass = 'team-grid-hero';
      else if (isCompact) gridClass = 'compact-avatar-grid';
      else if (isFeatured && group.members.length === 1) gridClass = 'team-grid-solo';
      else if (isFeatured && group.members.length > 2) gridClass = 'team-grid-team';
      else if (isFeatured) gridClass = 'team-grid-featured';
      else if (group.members.length === 3) gridClass = 'team-grid-three';
      else gridClass = 'team-grid team-grid-wide';

      const header = hasHeader
        ? `<h2 id="${group.id}">${group.name}</h2>`
        : '';
      const desc = group.description && group.description.trim()
        ? `<p>${group.description}</p>`
        : '';

      return `
        <div class="about-section">
          ${header}${desc}
          <div class="${gridClass}">
            ${cards}
          </div>
        </div>
        ${divider}`;
    }).join('');

    // Acknowledgments — lineage + Our Story + mission paper
    let acksHtml = '';
    if (data.acknowledgments) {
      acksHtml = `
        <hr class="about-divider" />
        <div class="about-section acknowledgments-block">
          <h2 id="acknowledgments">${data.acknowledgments.title}</h2>
          ${data.acknowledgments.body}
        </div>`;
    }

    container.innerHTML = groupsHtml + acksHtml;

    container.querySelectorAll('img[data-name]').forEach(img => {
      addFallback(img, img.dataset.name);
    });
    checkAvatars(container);

  } catch(e) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--ab-text-muted); text-align: center;">Could not load team data. <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book">View on GitHub</a>.</p>';
  }
})();
</script>
```

:::
